transcript.text: I wanted to go ahead and get a train from Sofia, Bulgaria to Bucharest, Romania, because it seemed like a cool distance to do, like overnight, so I could use the train as a hotel room, and the main reason is I wanted to get ahead.

I kind of feel like it's getting a little bit late. It's like halfway through July, and I have to get up to the northern tip of Norway by the halfway through point of August if I'm going to experience the forever daytime, so I've kind of been taking my time a lot more than I thought I was going to.
So, doing the train, it was about, how much, about 55 bucks for the, overnight, but I, check this out, I have my, it's like my own hotel room.
This is my own, my own room. This is my bike, this is my bed, and I have this whole place to myself, the way he said if I got, if I got, I'll close this.
The lady said if I got, um, first class, then 90% chance I'd get the room to myself. So, I got first class, and I have a room to myself. It's awesome.
I've never gotten a room to myself in an overnight train ride before, so it's kind of exciting.
So, I got to see, so I guess I'll turn this into my video, my bike touring blog, for the day of this day, um, which is the 13th. Okay, good.
Um, 13th of September, I mean, of July, of July, 2010.
